title: PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY - 211info
text: PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food pantry with canned goods, dairy, grains, produce, and meat. Household items such as diapers and wipes, pet supplies, laundry detergent, cleaning supplies, and paper products may be available when supply allows. Availability of items rotate and are provided through donations. Food donations are accepted. 3223 SE 92nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Pantry: Tuesday 4pm-7pm, Thursday 10am-1pm except on federal holidays Email (503) 442-8228 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 442-8228 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Phone: English, interpretation by arrangement Online ordering: English, Spanish, Arabic, Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Cleaning Products Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Laundry Products Personal/Grooming Supplies Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
